opencode.modelsDescription: Pick which models appear in the composer's picker.
opencode.customProvidersDescription: Add a provider by API key or OpenAI-compatible endpoint, saved to ~/.config/opencode.

claude.modelsDescription: Pick which official Claude models appear in the composer's picker.
claude.customProvidersDescription: Enter API keys here to use third-party models. They run alongside Claude Code's official models.

codex.modelsDescription: Pick which official Codex models appear in the composer's picker.
codex.customProvidersDescription: Point Codex at any OpenAI-compatible (Responses API) endpoint. Runs alongside the official models.

cursor.description: Add your API key, then pick which models appear in the composer's picker.

kimi.customProvidersDescription: Add an OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic-shaped endpoint, saved to ~/.kimi-code/config.toml.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: Routes all provider traffic — Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and Gemini.

multiSelect.noCachedModels: No cached models yet — click Refresh.

cursorBody.fetchError: Could not fetch models — {{error}}. The composer will fall back to Auto.

codexCustom.modelsHint: Fetch from the endpoint, then pick which appear in the composer.
codexCustom.emptyState: No custom Codex providers. Point Codex at any OpenAI-compatible (Responses API) endpoint.

openai.label: OpenAI-compatible
openai.hint: GET {base}/models · Authorization: Bearer. Base URL includes /v1.

modelsEditor.title: Models
modelsEditor.emptyState: No models yet — add the model ids your endpoint serves.
modelsEditor.reasoningLabel: Reasoning (effort) — only if the model supports it

opencodeModels.confirmDescription_one: Re-reading your config restarts OpenCode and will stop {{count}} running chat.
opencodeModels.confirmDescription_other: Re-reading your config restarts OpenCode and will stop {{count}} running chats.

localLlm.title: Local LLM
localLlm.description: Powers session title / branch name generation and Smart Triage — both run entirely on your device.
localLlm.noModelBanner: No model selected. Pick one from the Models dropdown below to start — including Custom if you already have a GGUF on disk.
localLlm.customSlotHint: Use your own GGUF file. Set the path below.

customPath.label: Custom model path
customPath.helpTooltip: Point this at a <0>.gguf</0> you've downloaded yourself. Curated models above take precedence — clear this field to switch back to the picker.

context.label: Context
context.helpTooltip: The total token budget for input + generated output combined. Bigger context lets you send longer prompts but uses more RAM and takes longer to start.
context.helpDefault: If you're unsure, the default ({{value}}) is sized to fit your hardware — leave it as is.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this model?
deleteDialog.descriptionFallback: This will remove the model from disk.
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: ({{size}}) from disk. You'll have to download it again to use it.
